note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for every DDD concept color (ADR 0004 — Concept Colors: one concept, one color, everywhere). A concept hex may be written ONLY here; every other occurrence is generated (per-project `gen-concept-colors` scripts, drift-guarded by sync tests) or var()-derived. `dark` values are copied verbatim from the historical Studio palette (src/styles/abstracts/_ddd.scss); `light` values are contrast-tuned darkenings (each ≥ 4.5:1 against #ffffff). `concepts` is ORDERED to match the LSP semantic-token modifier bits 1–15 (SemanticTokenModifier in src/Koine.Compiler/Services/SemanticTokenProvider.cs): concepts[i] ⇔ bit i+1. `modifier` is the LSP modifier name; `slug` is the CSS/var and class slug (`--koi-ddd-<slug>`, `cm-st-k-<slug>`).
